defs: Pertaining to the origin or beginning; preceding all others; first in order; primitive; primary; pristine; as, the original state of man; the original laws of a country; the original inventor of a process.
quotes: His form had yet not lost All her original brightness.

defs: Not copied, imitated, or translated; new; fresh; genuine; as, an original thought; an original process; the original text of Scripture.
Having the power to suggest new thoughts or combinations of thought; inventive; as, an original genius.
Before unused or unknown; new; as, a book full of original matter.

quotes: It hath it original from much grief.
And spangled heavens, a shining frame, Their great Original proclaim.

defs: That which precedes all others of its class; archetype; first copy; hence, an original work of art, manuscript, text, and the like, as distinguished from a copy, translation, etc.
quotes: The Scriptures may be now read in their own original.

defs: An original thinker or writer; an originator.
quotes: Men who are bad at copying, yet are good originals.

defs: The natural or wild species from which a domesticated or cultivated variety has been derived; as, the wolf is thought by some to be the original of the dog, the blackthorn the original of the plum.
